title: Get 6 things done for OSIG — Sept 20 2022 stacked-todo (meditation, US Bank card, MSI laptop, Costco contacts, WCS KJ, marinate chicken, vision goals)
html:
TL;DR

  • September 20, 2022 todo list framed as "Get at least 6 things done for the OSIG work" — Yahir using OSIG as the schedule-anchor for a stack of unrelated personal admin during the first week of fall term at OSU.
  • The list is a microcosm of the pattern: meditation (5 min), open a US Bank card, sell an MSI laptop on Facebook Marketplace, call Costco about contacts, send money to "WCS KJ", text family, MARINATE CHICKEN (caps in original), and — separated from the rest with whitespace — "OFFICIALLY WRITE DOWN GOALS AND VISIONS AND STEPS."
  • Captures the fall-2022 OSIG orbit five days after the brain computer interface "Mount Rushmore" idea and three days before the mom a house resolution — the same two-week window where Yahir's identity is consolidating.
  • The "OFFICIALLY WRITE DOWN GOALS" line foreshadows the manifesto style note genre that becomes a Yahir-trademark by 2024.
  • "WCS KJ" is opaque — likely a friend or family transfer to a Western Union–style channel; flagged as an unknown.

Key fragments

"MARINATE CHICKEN"

"OFFICIALLY WRITE DOWN GOALS AND VISIONS AND STEPS"

Why it matters

This note is the scaffolding around the OSIG year. It confirms that by late September 2022, OSIG was already functioning as the hour-keeper for Yahir's week — the thing he organized other tasks around. It also shows the early-fall headspace: he's still in admin-cleanup mode (selling old MSI laptop, opening new bank cards, moving money) but starting to ask the bigger question (write down goals/visions/steps) that the Ahmad Jamal note will spend the next ten months answering.

Open questions

  • Who or what is "WCS KJ"? (Possibly initials of a friend Yahir was Venmo'ing — flagged for next mention.)
  • Did the formal "goals and visions" doc ever get written, or did the Ahmad Jamal junk-drawer become the de facto version?
